listitem.para: What do Somali people speak as their primary language? Where might you find an interpreter for this group?
How would you greet a Somali male patient? A Somali female patient?
Explain decision-making practices among the Somali people. What implications does this have for your nursing care?
What are the primary non-communicable health conditions among Somalis? What might you do to help decrease some of them?
Name at least three infectious conditions common among Somali immigrants. What are the implications for your initial assessment and follow-up care?
Explain the name format for Somali men. For Somali Women.
Identify infant feeding beliefs among Somali families. What educational advice would you offer?
What is the dominant religious practice among Somalis? How does this affect your care?
How is depression seen among Somalis? What is your approach to addressing depression?
Identify several traditional healthcare practices. How might you incorporate traditional healers with allopathic treatments?
